# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

<!-- Release notes are auto-generated by release-please from Conventional Commits. -->

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- XLM local currency conversion display (KES, NGN, GHS, USD) with CoinGecko rate cache (#77)
- FAQ page at `/help/faq` with search and category filtering (#108)
- `docs/faq.md` kept in sync with in-app FAQ (#108)
- Release-please workflow for automated changelog and GitHub Releases (#104)
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` documenting the Conventional Commits and release process (#104)

---

## [1.0.0] - 2026-04-28

### Added
- Livestock collateral registration (cattle, goats, sheep) as on-chain Soroban collateral
- Loan request, partial/full repayment, and liquidation engine
- Health factor monitoring with real-time polling
- Freighter wallet integration
- Transaction history panel
- Loan repayment calculator
- Form auto-save with localStorage
- Offline banner for network detection
- Backend REST API (`/api/v1/`) with SQLite persistence and migration runner
- Docker Compose setup for frontend + backend
- Terraform infrastructure definitions
- GitHub Actions: integration tests, Docker security scan, Terraform check

[Unreleased]: https://github.com/teslims2/StellarKraal-/compare/v1.0.0...HEAD
[1.0.0]: https://github.com/teslims2/StellarKraal-/releases/tag/v1.0.0
